caption: The video depicts a medical simulation session taking place in a clinical setting, likely during "Sim Week," as indicated by the text on the screen. A healthcare professional, dressed in blue scrubs and gloves, is performing an ultrasound procedure on a mannequin. The individual is carefully maneuvering the ultrasound probe over the mannequin's abdomen, focusing intently on the task. In the background, another person, also wearing a mask, is observing and possibly providing guidance or feedback. The environment includes medical equipment such as a laptop displaying the ultrasound image, suggesting a hands-on training exercise for medical students transitioning to residency. The scene emphasizes practical learning and skill development in a controlled, educational setting.
